# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: backup-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: backup-bucket
    storageClass: STANDARD
    location: US
    defaultEventBasedHold: false
    retentionPolicy:
      isLocked: false
    labels:
      environment: production
      purpose: backups
    billing:
      requesterPays: false
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
    cors:
    - origin: []
      method: []
      responseHeader: []
      maxAgeSeconds: 0
    acl:
    - entity: project-owners
      role: OWNER
    - entity: project-editors
      role: OWNER
    - entity: project-viewers
      role: READER
    defaultObjectAcl:
    - entity: project-owners
      role: OWNER
    - entity: project-editors
      role: OWNER
    - entity: project-viewers
      role: READER
    logging:
      logBucket: ""
      logObjectPrefix: ""
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: ""
      notFoundPage: ""
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: false
    publicAccessPrevention: ""
    timeCreated: ""
    updated: ""
    metageneration: 0
    owner:
      entity: ""
      entityId: ""
    projectNumber: 0
    etag: ""
    selfLink: ""
    id: ""
    kind: ""
    locationType: ""
    customPlacements:
    - dataLocations: []
    - dataLocations: []
    - dataLocations: []
